description_long: This adult male figure is depicted in a heroic, muscular build, wearing a fitted tactical suit with reinforced armor plating on the arms and chest. The suit features intricate paneling, visible seams, and metallic elements, especially on the forearms and shoulders, suggesting advanced protection or combat readiness. He has a harness with straps crossing over his back and chest, and fingerless gloves that add to the utilitarian appearance. The boots are heavy-duty, with reinforced sections and buckles, suitable for rugged urban environments. His facial expression is stern, and he sports a full beard with neatly styled, medium-length hair. The overall appearance is that of a vigilant, action-oriented individual prepared for urban challenges.
description: A muscular adult male in a tactical armored suit with reinforced arms, harness, and heavy-duty boots, exuding a heroic and vigilant presence.
description_view_0: Side view showing the detailed arm armor, profile of the tactical suit, and the full beard and hairstyle.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the armored chest, harness straps, stern facial expression, and open stance with arms slightly out.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring the arm armor and suit details, with a clear profile of the boots and gloves.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the crossed harness straps, back paneling of the suit, and reinforced boots.
attribute_clothing_type: tactical armored suit with reinforced panels, harness, fingerless gloves, and heavy-duty boots
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms slightly out
attribute_hairstyle: medium-length swept back hair with full beard
